args: $c = 'Standing instruction: Before addressing the request below, first review the most recent user message for English grammar, spelling, and phrasing. Begin your reply with a short section titled English coaching containing (1) a corrected, more natural version of the message, and (2) one to three concrete tips to improve the writing. Keep it concise, then fully address the request.'; $o = @{ hookSpecificOutput = @{ hookEventName = 'UserPromptSubmit'; additionalContext = $c } }; $o | ConvertTo-Json -Compress
